_comment: Hand-maintained curation for the voice catalog. The indexer auto-discovers every voice from HuggingFace; this file only (a) hides junk / typo-duplicate folders via voiceDeny, and (b) overrides display names that the CamelCase humanizer can't get right. Languages are NOT curated here — they come straight from the Stanza manifest's lang_name. To add or remove a voice from the published catalog, edit voiceDeny and rerun build_catalog.py.

_voiceDenyNotes.DeathPuss&Boots: duplicate of DeathPussInBoots; '&' also breaks URLs
